channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House to vote on ICE funding, ending months-long impasse
item.description: The House will be voting on Republicans' $70 billion bill to fund immigration enforcement agencies for the rest of the Trump administration.

item.title: DOJ says EEOC broke law by pushing employers toward race-based choices
item.description: The Justice Department stated that the EEOC violated civil rights laws through guidelines that coerced employers into making race-based decisions.

item.title: Rahm Emanuel faces tough challenge in New Hampshire, testing 2028 presidential hopes
New York's Penn Station to undergo $8B renovation with columns, natural light, and Trump's name
item.description: Amtrak and developers have revealed designs for a major overhaul of New York City's Pennsylvania Station.
